hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams collect and preserve Travel Rule messages, exceptions and decisions within a unified operational workflow to support evidence review and audit readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule evidence remains siloed and incomplete
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to compile and connect Travel Rule messages, exceptions, and decisions across multiple systems. This slows evidence collection and makes audit readiness and regulatory review more complex and time-consuming.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates Travel Rule messages, exceptions, decisions and provider outputs into one audit-ready workflow that supports case management, evidence preservation and streamlined regulatory review for VASPs.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exception to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule exceptions through case review, compliance decisions and evidence preservation to support operational audit trails and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns Travel Rule messages and exceptions into structured cases, audit evidence and review-ready workflows without replacing existing providers or tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled workflows that preserve Travel Rule audit evidence, enable provider orchestration and prepare compliance-ready records for banking and internal review.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how Travel Rule evidence is collected and preserved
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how Travel Rule exceptions generate compliance cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports Travel Rule review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration logic for Travel Rule message routing
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures Travel Rule messages, routes data, manages exceptions, and creates cases to support VASP compliance workflows within a connected operational layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes, tracks and documents Travel Rule exceptions, enabling structured case creation and human review while preserving related decisions and audit evidence.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed logs, decision records and linked evidence from Travel Rule messages and exception handling to support audit readiness and supervisory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing Travel Rule providers and compliance tools, applying internal rules and workflows without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows, cases and evidence for operational compliance control.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule evidence into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects message, exception and decision data into audit-ready cases for efficient Travel Rule evidence management.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
